# MVP Scope: [Feature Name]

## Core Value Proposition

> Users come to us because [one sentence value prop].

## Success Criteria

- [ ] [Measurable outcome 1: e.g., User can complete X in under Y minutes]
- [ ] [Measurable outcome 2: e.g., Z% of users return within 7 days]

---

## Scope Definition

### ✅ In Scope (V1)

| Feature     | Priority | Effort | Rationale               |
| ----------- | -------- | ------ | ----------------------- |
| [Feature 1] | P0       | S      | [Why essential for MVP] |
| [Feature 2] | P0       | M      | [Why essential for MVP] |
| [Feature 3] | P1       | S      | [Nice to have if time]  |

**Effort Key**: S = <1 day, M = 1-3 days, L = 3-5 days, XL = 1+ week

### ❌ Out of Scope (V1)

| Feature     | Why Not Now                          | Future Version |
| ----------- | ------------------------------------ | -------------- |
| [Feature A] | [Adds complexity without core value] | V2             |
| [Feature B] | [Requires infrastructure not ready]  | V3             |
| [Feature C] | [User research didn't validate need] | Never          |

---

## Technical Constraints

- **Must integrate with**: [Existing systems, APIs]
- **Cannot exceed**: [Time budget, resource limits]
- **Dependencies**: [What needs to exist first]

## Definition of Done

- [ ] User can complete primary action end-to-end
- [ ] Core success metric can be measured
- [ ] No critical bugs in happy path
- [ ] Basic error handling in place
- [ ] Deployed to [staging/production]
